name: Notes
description: Personal notes with folders, tags, full-text search, and trash management for your workspace.

tools.name: tool_notes_chat
tools.description: Personal notes assistant — create, read, update, delete, search, organize notes with folders and tags, move notes, manage trash

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_notes
tools.description: Refresh note statistics: total count, pinned, trash, recent titles.

tools.name: list_notes
tools.description: List notes (paginated). Returns up to `limit` rows per call (max 200). If `has_more` is true, call again with `offset=offset+limit`.

tools.name: get_note
tools.description: Get full content of a note by ID.

tools.name: create_note
tools.description: Create a new note.

tools.name: update_note
tools.description: Update note title, content, tags, or pin status.

tools.name: move_note
tools.description: Move note to a folder, or root with empty folder_id.

tools.name: delete_note
tools.description: Delete a note (moves to trash).

tools.name: permanent_delete_note
tools.description: Permanently delete a note. Cannot be undone.

tools.name: search_notes
tools.description: Full-text search across all notes (paginated, max 50 per page).

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List all note folders.

tools.name: resolve_folder
tools.description: Resolve a folder by name (case-insensitive). Returns folder_id and match_quality.

tools.name: create_folder
tools.description: Create a new folder.

tools.name: rename_folder
tools.description: Rename an existing folder.

tools.name: delete_folder
tools.description: Delete a folder (notes move to root).

tools.name: list_trash
tools.description: List all notes in trash.

tools.name: restore_note
tools.description: Restore a note from trash.

tools.name: empty_trash
tools.description: Permanently delete all trashed notes.

tools.name: note_save
tools.description: Save a note field from the editor panel (title, content, tags, folder, pin, archive).

tools.name: upload_attachment
tools.description: Upload a file attachment to a note.

tools.name: delete_attachment
tools.description: Delete a file attachment from a note.

tools.name: duplicate_note
tools.description: Duplicate a note — copies title, content, folder, and tags into a new note.

tools.name: export_markdown
tools.description: Export a note as Markdown. Returns the converted content with a download button.

tools.name: __panel__sidebar
tools.description: Panel: Notes

tools.name: __panel__editor
tools.description: Panel: Editor
